title: Writings of People with Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) 2025
description: The data consists of writings in which the respondents describe their experiences related to polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). The data was originally collected for a master's thesis that examined the experiences of women living with PCOS regarding the stigma associated with womanhood. The invitation to write asked participants to share their personal experiences related to the condition and to reflect on the situations in which they had experienced stigma directed at women due to their PCOS sym
